# sonarjs/no-nested-functions

📝 Functions should not be nested too deeply.

💼 This rule is enabled in the ✅ `recommended` config.

<!-- end auto-generated rule header -->

<!-- begin auto-generated rule options list -->

| Name        | Type    | Default |
| :---------- | :------ | :------ |
| `threshold` | Integer | `4`     |
